metadata.documentation: The Amazon Chime SDK media pipeline APIs in this section allow software developers to create Amazon Chime SDK media pipelines and capture audio, video, events, and data messages from Amazon Chime SDK meetings. For more information about media pipleines, see Amzon Chime SDK media pipelines.
